meaning: n.舰队(尤指有固定活动地区的舰队),港湾,小河adj.快速的,敏捷的,浅的adv.浅vt.消磨vi.疾驰,飞逝,掠过
examples: Russia and Ukraine have been disputing the ownership of the fleet.
With its own fleet of trucks, the company delivers most orders overnight.
They maintain a very powerful fleet in Oriental waters.
The ferry is part of a small fleet of diesel-electric boats first launched in 1888.
Virgin, with a young, efficient fleet of airliners, does well in most of them.
